title: 周りから見た勝負服姿

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day as I'm walking through the academy, I
notice a crowd gathered in a hallway.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow... She's incredible...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can't even begin to describe her aura.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: She's really amazing...
choice_data_list: What's going on?
What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's holding a press conference. Here, take a
look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Glancing into the room, I see Oguri Cap in her
signature racewear being interviewed.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You look like you're ready to start racing right
now!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sure. When I put on my racewear, I naturally feel
that way.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
I think I can speak for everyone when I say we're
all excited to see you run!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll try hard not to let anyone down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oguri really looks dignified in her racewear,
doesn't she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's soft-spoken, yet her spirit and confidence
shine right through...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can see how her fans are drawn to those
qualities in her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
choice_data_list: Is something wrong?
Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm just thinking that I've still got a long way to go
compared to Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I put on my signature racewear, it feels
more like I'm wearing a costume. Haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Mejiro Ryan isn't very confident in
how she looks in her racewear.
choice_data_list: How about we do some training right now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What? It's a bit early still. But I don't mind, of
course.
choice_data_list: All right. Get changed into your racewear!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oka—huh?! My racewear?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, I got changed...
choice_data_list: Good. Now try running a lap.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What?! You mean... in my racewear?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just told you that it doesn't feel right on me at
all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her embarrassment, Mejiro Ryan starts
running. But then...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: It's like I'm watching a real race! Go for it, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text:
We're rooting for you! We know you'll get first
place in your next race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...
choice_data_list: You've got a lot of support.
You've got a lot of support.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It's surprising.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I could understand them cheering on Oguri out
there. But me?
choice_data_list: Admiration builds up over time.
Admiration builds up over time.

You've done enough to make people aspire to
be like you.

You've done enough to make people aspire to
be like you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I could understand them cheering on Oguri out
there. But me?
choice_data_list: Admiration builds up over time.
Admiration builds up over time.

You've done enough to make people aspire to
be like you.

You've done enough to make people aspire to
be like you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It does?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I see... Even if I'm not at Oguri's level, I've done
my fair share of running, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And people admire me enough now to cheer me
on.
choice_data_list:
Your racewear is a representation of all the
efforts you've made!

Your racewear is a representation of all the
efforts you've made!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heh, so it's just like muscles!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My daily efforts keep accumulating, and people
are beginning to admire that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I won't stop putting all my heart into running! And
I'll keep improving both my muscles and my
racewear!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ooh, yeah! I'm gonna run another lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a new understanding that admiration comes
with time, Ryan begins running at full power.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: They wanna be like me too?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume E
text_block_list.text: Ryan! I've been watching you train!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume F
text_block_list.text:
If it's okay, would you like to run together? I want
to see you up close on the track!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wow! I can't believe you guys!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume E
text_block_list.text:
I've always admired how you look in your outfit!
Please let me run with you too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: O-okay! If you're sure you want to!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll be off then, Trainer. Looks like there's
no time to be gloomy!
choice_data_list: Yeah! Go out there and run like the wind!
Yeah! Go out there and run like the wind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right! I won't put my racewear to shame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan starts running with all her power—to
honor both her racewear and the younger racers
who admire her.
